subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The Sun of bounty hath dawned, the Ocean of knowledge surgeth, and the Heaven of grace is exalted, yet all remain heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله آفتاب کرم مشرق و بحر علم مواج و آسمان فضل مرتفع ولکن کل غافل
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @contention and conflict, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
